description_long: A rectangular ceramic plate with a blue and white wave pattern holds five golden-brown pan-fried dumplings arranged in a neat row. The dumplings have a crescent shape with pleated edges and a slightly crispy, browned surface, indicating they have been cooked on one side. Next to the dumplings, a small square ceramic dish contains a dark soy-based dipping sauce. The plate and sauce dish are both crafted from glazed ceramic, giving them a smooth and slightly glossy finish. The dumplings appear plump, suggesting a generous filling inside. The overall presentation is clean and appetizing, suitable for a restaurant or street food vendor.
description: Five crescent-shaped, pan-fried dumplings are neatly arranged on a blue and white ceramic plate with a small square dish of dipping sauce.
description_view_0: This view shows the dumplings from a front angle, highlighting their golden-brown tops and the patterned ceramic plate with the sauce dish on the right.
description_view_1: From this side angle, the pleated edges and the thickness of the dumplings are visible, with the sauce dish positioned at the front right.
description_view_2: This rear angle emphasizes the back of the dumplings and the sauce dish, showing the arrangement from the opposite side.
description_view_3: This view presents the dumplings from the opposite end, focusing on the rounded backs and the sauce dish now at the rear left.
